name: 3D Eyelash Serum
pros: Trending on SNS with 4.55★ rating from 657 reviews—strong social proof
Affordable at ¥3,280; accessible for regular use or testing
Works for both natural lashes and extensions, offering versatility
cons: High SNS hype doesn't always translate to dramatic real-world results
Limited brand heritage; newer entrant with minimal international recognition
shortDescription: Trending eyelash serum with solid reviews; affordable entry point for lash care.
review: This 3D Eyelash Serum has captured attention on Japanese social media and maintains respectable 4.55-star reviews. At ¥3,280, it's an accessible option for anyone curious about lash serums without breaking the bank. That said, it's riding a hype wave more than offering proven innovation—results vary, and the brand is relatively new to the market.
